meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (monad)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0x852976d4c837824e53357E84e851ce0C5A1092ff on monad.
